title: Sum of values from a column in subitems
excerpt: Hi Have two columns (mirror columns) named total assets and total hours in subitems. How do I sum them up and show them on the main item level using sum formula?

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Have two columns (mirror columns) named total assets and total hours in subitems. How do I sum them up and show them on the main item level using sum formula?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ameya.athalye

In the subitems column menu (3 dot menu in column header) you can select “show summary in parent”.

posts.author: Molina (Irene)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ameya.athalye @basdebruin

In order to complete the information.

In the menu of the column mirror, you can customize the information. In “settings” you can choose between SUM, AVERAGE, MEDIAN… etc.

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried that. It doesn’t show the sum but instead shows all assets separated by comma. Something like this “5,2,3,1,3”.

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see those options. Can you elaborate?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
When your subitems column is a text column, you will get 1,2,3
When your subitems column is a number column, you will get 6

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: It is neither. It’s a mirror column. Sorry I should’ve stated that. I’m pulling the values for hours and assets from a different board using connect board. Can you copy value from one column (mirror type) to another column (text or number type)?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: That is a completely different story . As far as I know making doing the “create summary in parent” does shows mirror columns always as text. (1,2,3)
